chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-7758 of 2019 __________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) __________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc.No.34267/2019 2. For hearing of main case. 29.09.2021 Mr. Aijaz Ahmed Zahid, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ameer Bux Metlo, Advocate for Respondent Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi Deputy Attorney General Mr. Hussain Bohra, Assistant Attorney General. ------------ Mr. Aijaz Ahmed Zahid, learned counsel for the petitioner, submits that the questions involved in this petition are identical to those which have been already decided and a covered case on Super Tax which is reported in 2020 PTD 1742. Mr. Metlo Advocate concedes to such statement. The rationale and reasoning shall apply mutatis mutandis. Copy of judgment may also be placed on record. The instant Petition stands disposed of accordingly along with pending applications. J U D G E J U D G E Amjad/PA
